Pettix is a comprehensive pet care platf: Pettix is a comprehensive pet care platform that connects pet lovers, facilitates adoption, provides access to veterinary clinics, and offers an online store for pet supplies.
Is Pettix available on Android and iOS?: Is Pettix available on Android and iOS?
Yes! Pettix is available on both Android: Yes! Pettix is available on both Android and iOS devices. Download it for free from the Google Play Store or the Apple App Store.
Creating an account and browsing the pla: Creating an account and browsing the platform is completely free. Some premium features and store purchases may require payment.
How do I create an account?: How do I create an account?
Tap \"Sign Up\" on the login screen, ent: Tap "Sign Up" on the login screen, enter your email address, set a password, and verify your email with the OTP we send you.
How do I reset my password?: How do I reset my password?
Tap \"Forgot Password?\" on the login sc: Tap "Forgot Password?" on the login screen, enter your email, and follow the instructions in the email we send you.
How do I update my profile information?: How do I update my profile information?
Go to your Profile from the menu, tap th: Go to your Profile from the menu, tap the pen icon on your avatar or open the drawer and select "Edit Profile".
Yes. Go to Settings > Account > Delete A: Yes. Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Note that this action is permanent and all your data will be removed.
How do I adopt a pet?: How do I adopt a pet?
Browse the Adoption section, find a pet: Browse the Adoption section, find a pet you like, and tap "Apply". Fill in the adoption form and wait for approval from the owner.
How can I track my adoption application?: How can I track my adoption application?
Go to Adoption > My Applications to see: Go to Adoption > My Applications to see the status of all your submitted adoption requests.
Can I list my pet for adoption?: Can I list my pet for adoption?
Yes. In the Adoption section, tap the \": Yes. In the Adoption section, tap the "+" button and fill in your pet's details, photos, and requirements for potential adopters.
How do I place an order?: How do I place an order?
Browse the Store, add items to your cart: Browse the Store, add items to your cart, select your delivery address, and confirm your payment.
We accept credit/debit cards, mobile wal: We accept credit/debit cards, mobile wallets, and cash on delivery (where available).
How do I return a product?: How do I return a product?
You can return most products within 14 d: You can return most products within 14 days of delivery. Go to My Orders, select the item, and tap "Request Return".

Our mission, features, and contact info: Our mission, features, and contact info
How we collect and protect your data: How we collect and protect your data
Rules and guidelines for using Pettix: Rules and guidelines for using Pettix
Pettix is dedicated to connecting pet lo: Pettix is dedicated to connecting pet lovers, facilitating pet adoption, providing access to veterinary services, and offering a comprehensive marketplace for all your pet needs. We believe every pet deserves a loving home and proper care.
We collect information you provide direc: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and profile photo when you create an account. We also collect usage data, device information, and location data (when you grant permission) to improve our services and personalize your experience.
We use the information we collect to pro: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send notifications, personalize your experience, and communicate with you about updates, promotions, and support.
We do not sell your personal information: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with service providers who assist us in operating our platform, complying with legal obligations, or protecting our rights. We ensure all third parties adhere to appropriate data protection standards.
We implement industry-standard security: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular audits to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
You have the right to access, update or: You have the right to access, update or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings. You may also request a copy of your data or withdraw consent for certain data processing activities.
We use cookies and similar tracking tech: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our platform. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Some features may not function properly if you disable cookies.
We may update this Privacy Policy from t: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes via email or a prominent notice in the app. Continued use of Pettix after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
By accessing and using Pettix, you accep: By accessing and using Pettix, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
You are responsible for maintaining the: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account and to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
You may not use Pettix for any illegal o: You may not use Pettix for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. Prohibited activities include posting false information, impersonating others, spreading harmful content, attempting to breach security, or engaging in any activity that violates applicable laws.
All content, trademarks, and software on: All content, trademarks, and software on Pettix are the property of Pettix or its content suppliers and are protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.
Pettix shall not be liable for any indir: Pettix shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of our services. Our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.
We reserve the right to suspend or termi: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion. You may also delete your account at any time through the app settings.
These Terms shall be governed by and con: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of competent courts.
You may return most items within 14 days: You may return most items within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be unused, in the same condition you received them, and in their original packaging to qualify for a return.
Once we receive your returned item, we w: Once we receive your returned item, we will inspect it and process your refund within 5-7 business days. Refunds are issued to the original payment method used at the time of purchase.
Certain items are non-refundable, includ: Certain items are non-refundable, including perishable goods (food, treats), hygiene products, custom-made items, and digital products once downloaded or activated.
Original shipping costs are non-refundab: Original shipping costs are non-refundable. Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the item is defective, damaged, or was sent incorrectly.
If you receive a damaged or defective it: If you receive a damaged or defective item, please contact us immediately with photos. We will provide a free replacement or a full refund including shipping costs at no additional charge to you.
Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours o: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement for a full refund. Once the order has been processed and shipped, cancellations are no longer possible and the standard return process applies.
Are you sure you want to logout?: Are you sure you want to logout?
